title: lomaria lanceolata
intro: Lomaria lanceolata, also known as the fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Osmundaceae family. The medicinal properties of Lomaria lanceolata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to promote digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Lomaria lanceolata include decoctions, infusions, and ointments that can be used to treat various health conditions.
